summary: RED baselines set: 2 oracle tests un-skipped (AC-840-1, AC-840-2); 3 disjointness tests RED (function missing); 3 weather tests GREEN (no code defect).

steps.coverage_reviewed: n/a — step-0 RED baseline only; coverage at re-review post-fix

findings.claim: CASE-1a-preferred RED: window-close uses scheduledMins+timeFlex instead of preferredTimeMins+timeFlex
findings.evidence: Expected: false, Received: true — code windowClose=420+180=600; now=630>=600 → true; spec requires preferred=480+flex=180=660; now=630<660 → false
findings.fix: bert: fix taskMappers.js overdue IIFE to use preferred_time_mins ?? scheduledMins for window-close base

findings.claim: CASE-10a RED: guard time_flex > 0 excludes time_flex=0; falls through to anytime path → overdue=false
findings.evidence: Expected: true, Received: false — guard `row.time_flex > 0` at taskMappers.js ~423 must become `row.time_flex != null && row.time_flex >= 0`
findings.fix: bert: change flex guard in taskMappers.js from `> 0` to `!= null && >= 0` (or add explicit === 0 branch)

findings.claim: checkPlacementDisjointness not yet in runSchedule.js exports; all 3 tests throw TypeError
findings.evidence: TypeError: checkPlacementDisjointness is not a function at all 3 test bodies (lines 52, 68, 84)
findings.fix: bert: implement checkPlacementDisjointness(dayPlacements) and add to module.exports in runSchedule.js; see TEST-CATALOG.md for full signature contract

findings.claim: weatherOk already exported and correct; 3 regression-lock tests GREEN; no code defect
findings.evidence: All 3 pass: temp(30)>max(25)→false; temp(20)<=max(25)→true; max=null→true. Export: module.exports._testOnly.weatherOk (unifiedScheduleV2.js:2443)
